ddls:
CREATE TABLE "data_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the data category (e.g., Identifiers, Personal Information) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the data category was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the data category was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_details" (
  "detail_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data detail */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data category */,
  "example" TEXT /* Examples of personal information within the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data detail */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the data detail was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the data detail was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("detail_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_details_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES data_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_collection" (
  "collection_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data collection record */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data category */,
  "collected" TEXT /* Whether the data is collected (YES/NO) */,
  "business_purpose" TEXT /* Business or commercial purpose of collecting the data */,
  "data_subject" TEXT /* The subject of the data collection (e.g., customer, employee) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the data collection record was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the data collection record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collection_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_collection_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES data_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "third_parties" (
  "third_party_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each third party */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the third party */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the third party */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data category */,
  "sharing_purpose" TEXT /* Purpose of sharing the data with the third party */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the third party record was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the third party record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("third_party_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_third_parties_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES data_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_consent" (
  "consent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user consent */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user giving consent */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data category */,
  "consent_status" TEXT /* Status of the consent (e.g., OPT_IN, OPT_OUT) */,
  "consent_date" TEXT /* Date the consent was given */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date the consent expires */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the consent record was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the consent record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("consent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_consent_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_consent_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES data_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., customer, employee, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sharing" (
  "sharing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data sharing activity */,
  "third_party_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the third party */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user whose data is shared */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data category */,
  "sharing_date" TEXT /* Date the data was shared */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the sharing record was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the sharing record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sharing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_sharing_third_party_id FOREIGN KEY ("third_party_id") REFERENCES third_parties ("third_party_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_sharing_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_sharing_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES data_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data category */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date the data was accessed */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the access record was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the access record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_access_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES data_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_retention" (
  "retention_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each retention record */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data category */,
  "retention_period" INTEGER /* Retention period (in months or years) */,
  "retention_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the retention period */,
  "retention_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the retention period */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the retention record was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the retention record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("retention_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_retention_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES data_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_deletion" (
  "deletion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each deletion record */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data category */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user whose data is deleted */,
  "deletion_date" TEXT /* Date the data was deleted */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the deletion record was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the deletion record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("deletion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_deletion_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_deletion_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES data_categories ("category_id")
)
